generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) for dynamic lighting control, modeled within BIM to enable bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin. Extracts device metadata (tenant ID, endpoint addresses) from BIM for real-time operation."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded controller within Building Control Systems (BCS) for HVAC systems, integrated with the Digital Twin via BIM-based semantic mapping. Supports real-time adjustments to thermal/humidity settings based on operational data."
]

instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for automated infrastructure responding to occupancy sensor data, enabling dynamic adjustments to building systems like lighting and HVAC."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure to capture real-time temperature data, semantically linked to BIM elements for contextual data alignment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental IoT sensor measuring real-time humidity levels, integrated with Eclipse Hono for seamless data ingestion into the BIM-based Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental IoT sensor capturing real-time light level data, feeding into the Digital Twin for adaptive lighting optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataStream
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting real-time occupancy status within building spaces, enabling dynamic adjustments to building systems via the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMFoundationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational Building Information Model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of all building components, serving as the semantic backbone for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToolEnabler, MDETransformationEnabler
]

instance RuntimeSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated runtime model containing device metadata and control logic extracted from BIM via Model-Driven Engineering transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDataIngestionEnabler, DittoRuntimeEnabler
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streams ingested via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, synchronized with the Digital Twin for operational analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, LightLevelDataStream, OccupancyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler, AnalyticsEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and interactive simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance HonoDataIngestionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors and the Digital Twin via MQTT-based messaging."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform managing runtime semantics and device configurations, enabling seamless integration of sensor streams into the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeControlService, OccupantComfortService
]

instance BIMToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) used for initial modeling and device configuration within the AECO domain."
]

instance MDETransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodology automating the extraction of domain semantics from BIM models to generate runtime interfaces."
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization and interactive monitoring capabilities for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance AnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime analytics engine processing real-time sensor data for predictive maintenance and optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building operations through synchronized data from physical sensors and the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyStatusInsight, EnvironmentalConditionInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering predictive maintenance alerts and performance benchmarking insights based on real-time analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACFailureAlertInsight, EnergyConsumptionInsight
]

instance RuntimeControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning for lighting optimization) based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling immersive 3D visualization and interactive simulation of building operations within Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationVisualizationInsight
]

instance OccupantComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing and optimizing occupant comfort through real-time adjustments to thermal and humidity settings."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalComfortInsight, HumidityAdjustmentAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing energy optimization recommendations based on real-time sensor data and operational patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsRecommendationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into building occupancy status, enabling dynamic adjustments to lighting and HVAC systems."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, light levels) for adaptive building control."
]

instance HVACFailureAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alert for potential HVAC component failures based on real-time performance analytics."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance benchmarking insight comparing as-designed vs. as-operated energy consumption metrics."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adaptive lighting optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time HVAC system adjustments based on occupancy and environmental sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time analytics on thermal comfort conditions within building spaces."
]

instance HumidityAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to humidity settings based on occupant comfort analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergySavingsRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for reducing energy consumption through adaptive building operations."
]

// C18: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure encompassing all components and systems modeled within the Digital Twin."
    base:contains LightingActuator, HVACController, OccupancyActuator,
                  PermafrostTemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor,
                  LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment representing the building infrastructure with all runtime semantics and simulation capabilities."
    base:contains BIMFoundationModel, RuntimeSemanticModel,
                  SensorDataStream, VisualizationModel
]

// Added missing instances based on characteristics
instance ModelDrivenDeploymentWorkflow : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling automated deployment of runtime artifacts from BIM models to operational systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactDeployment
]

instance RuntimeArtifactDeployment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of runtime components generated from BIM models to operational middleware."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingOperationVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing immersive visualization of building operations for interactive monitoring and analysis."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved via **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to physical actuators through the same middleware infrastructure (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework supports **bidirectional communication**, allowing the DT to send commands (e.g., adjust lighting levels, HVAC setpoints) to physical systems based on real-time analytics or user inputs. This interaction is enabled by **runtime artifacts** automatically generated from the BIM model, which define the control logic and device configurations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** depending on sensor data frequency and middleware latency. The framework supports **low-latency data processing** for critical control applications (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **periodic updates** for non-critical analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with a **centralized DT framework** integrating:
   - **BIM models** as the semantic backbone.
   - **Middleware layers** (Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange.
   - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine) for user interaction.
   - **Extensible service modules** (e.g., control logic, analytics) connected via standardized interfaces. The framework enables **modular deployment** of DT components, allowing incremental scaling and integration of new services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building: **design** (BIM modeling), **construction** (device integration), **operation** (real-time monitoring), and **refurbishment** (adaptive updates). The framework supports **dynamic evolution** of the DT by embedding **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic) into the BIM model, ensuring alignment with the **as-built** and **as-operated** states of the physical asset. The **BOREALIS project** exemplifies this by using post-occupancy sensor data to iteratively refine control policies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the **alignment between virtual and physical representations**.
   - **Model validation** during deployment to ensure **semantic consistency** with BIM and runtime data.
   - **Real-time synchronization** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** to minimize **data latency and drift**.
   The framework addresses **semantic drift** (as referenced in related work) through **iterative refinement of control policies** using **post-occupancy data**. However, **uncertainty quantification** (e.g., statistical analysis) is not explicitly implemented in the described system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono** (for device connectivity) and **Ditto** (for state management) using **MQTT-based protocols** for real-time communication. The middleware integrates with **BIM models** via standardized metadata schemas (e.g., tenant IDs, device endpoints) to enable **bidirectional data flow**. Network protocols are optimized for **low-latency** interactions, critical for control applications (e.g., lighting adjustments)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **middleware-centric framework**, hosted via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** (likely in a **cloud-native or hybrid architecture**) to support **scalable, distributed operations**. The framework does not specify dedicated rendering servers but leverages **Unreal Engine’s cloud capabilities** for visualization. Deployment involves:
   - **Automated artifact generation**: MDE transforms BIM models into **deployable configurations** for Hono/Ditto.
   - **Modular service deployment**: Custom services are integrated via **standardized extension points**.
   - **Lifecycle-aware hosting**: Ensures **low-overhead updates** and **scalability** across building infrastructures."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized extension points**: Enable **plug-and-play integration** of **third-party services** (e.g., ERP, CMMS) via **modular APIs**.
   - **Interoperability frameworks**: Compliance with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) and **middleware protocols** (e.g., Hono/Ditto).
   - **Data normalization**: Ensures **semantic consistency** across **heterogeneous systems** (e.g., BIM, IoT, visualization tools).
   The framework emphasizes **scalable, interoperable architectures** to facilitate **cross-system collaboration**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **standardized integration frameworks** (e.g., **Eclipse Ditto/Hono protocols**) and **BIM-based semantic alignment** to ensure interoperability. While specific **industry standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) are not explicitly referenced, the system leverages **BIM’s role as the semantic foundation** and **modular service architectures** to comply with **AECO domain conventions**. The **standardized extension points** enable compliance with **future standardization efforts** in DT deployment."
]
